m1_subject: GPS load monitoring and injury prevention at Pacific Sports Academy
m1_body_email:
Hi Sarah,

Running a sports science program across multiple squads means balancing training intensity with injury risk on a daily basis. Many heads of performance I speak with find that traditional monitoring approaches create data silos between S&C and coaching staff.

I work with a B2B SaaS platform that helps sports science teams centralize GPS load data, automate threshold alerts, and share actionable dashboards with coaches in real time.

Would it be worth a quick conversation about how your current monitoring setup handles cross-squad load comparisons?
